title: 2026 Golden Globes Prediction Market Projections
text: 2026 Golden Globes Prediction Market Odds. Based on the article's analysis of Kalshi prediction markets, here are the key frontrunners: Best Motion Picture Drama: Sinners leads with the shortest odds, though Hamnet is described as a closing in contender. Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy: One Battle after Another is heavily favored, being only the sixth in history to be nominated across all six acting categories. Best Motion Picture Animated: KPop Demon Hunters is the top choice, with Zootopia 2 also competitive. Best Screenplay: One Battle After Another has by far the strongest probability, though It Was Just an Accident and Hamnet are gaining ground. Acting Categories: Drama Actor: Wagner Moura's chances outshine those of his competitors by a long way. Musical/Comedy Actor: Timothee Chalamet leads over Leonardo DiCaprio. Drama Actress: Jessie Buckley is the favorite over Renate Reinsve. Musical/Comedy Actress: Rose Byrne is favored, with Emma Stone as a potential upset pick. TV Series Drama: The Pitt is positioned as likely to win, though competition from Pluribus and Severance remains fierce.
